name: Chiara Valli
bio: Chiara oversees project delivery across heritage and rural restoration work, with a focus on period interiors and reclaimed material sourcing in Italy.

name: Elena Conti
bio: Elena founded Orenda in 2014. She leads all design direction across the Milan and Geneva studios, focusing on material longevity and atmospheric light.

name: Marco Ferretti
bio: Marco leads material research and bespoke fabrication across residential and hospitality commissions, working closely with craft partners in Milan.
